description: Figshare is a research repository and data-sharing platform used to publish, manage, and discover articles, datasets, collections, and other research outputs. It provides hosting, metadata, and access workflows for public and private scholarly content.
summary: Figshare exposes one documented REST API at `https://api.figshare.com/v2`; it supports OAuth2 access tokens and personal tokens, with no public GraphQL API, MCP server, or first-party CLI found.
